title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with T.M. Opera
O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! It appears the rather intense gaze I was
feeling belongs to that cute little audience!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Forever trapped within a glass cage, they can
never bask in the sun that is my presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I, who brings light to this world, shall provide
you support with an inspiring opera!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
May your rescue scene be a success, so as not to
crush the hopes and dreams of those children!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
